canonical_identity: (scenario_id, seed, horizon=600); 48 scenarios x 30 seeds (paper_eval_s30, seeds 111-140) = 1440

contamination_and_filter.five_non_ppo_arms_source: job 13376/13378 lineage, contaminated resume-append (8640 rows/arm = 6 complete append-blocks)
contamination_and_filter.filter_rule: Each arm's episodes.jsonl contains 6 complete append-blocks keyed by git_hash, each with all 1440 canonical identities. Verified metric-invariance: 0 cross-block disagreements on success/collision/SNQI across all 1440 identities in every arm, so block selection is provably immaterial. Canonical representative = frozen public commit a596a33b27acc835a6c1b399bd36cd2699792437 (last-timestamped attempt / preregistered frozen S30 SHA).
contamination_and_filter.ppo_arm_source: clean rerun job 13388 (issue4365_h600_ppo_only_s30_rerun_20260713), single commit, resume:false

limitations: PPO arm ran at public commit 502564935 (main + config-only) vs the five clean arms at a596a33b; delta is configuration-only, scenario-matrix hash/seed set/horizon match (matrix-compatible), carried as a stated limitation.
SNQI carries a documented contract-failure caveat (see #5512); reported as companion only, not promoted.
Leading hybrid (v3 continuous) mean episode wall time is ~13.6x ORCA (18.25s vs 1.34s) -- efficiency caveat.
Simulator-only evidence; no independent clean-machine or real-world validation; AMV coverage incomplete.

Provenance narratives across comments cite job 13376 (block cef4b78) and job 13378 (block a596a33b); both blocks are metric-identical to all others, so the analytic result is invariant to that provenance debate.
source_path_note: Paths are repo-relative to their respective camera-ready worktree roots (retained on the private hub); raw JSONL is not committed.
